summary: Verified bug fix for JWT-based user advancement on /api/booking/book. E2E test completed successfully: logged in as raymond@fireside360.co.uk, booked a real PB session using a DIFFERENT email (raymond+6666@controlswitch.io), and confirmed the LOGGED-IN user (not the booking form email) was advanced to Step 2 via the new JWT path. All assertions passed in network, DB, backend logs, and UI.
critical_code_review_comments: booking.py _decode_optional_jwt_user_id correctly treats JWT as an optional hint (silent failure) — good defensive pattern.
JWT user lookup takes precedence over email match; email fallback preserved for unauthenticated flows.
Non-blocking error handler around the user-advancement block prevents booking failure if DB update fails — correct.
LeadConnector webhook uses user.email (logged-in account) rather than booking form email (request.email) — matches intent of Approach A.

Unrelated observation (not part of this bug): frontend console logs a 500 from an 'Error completing task' call during Step 1→2 transition; the backend booking flow itself is unaffected and user progression still succeeds. Worth a follow-up look by main agent.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (booking flow, UI advancement, and API integration all verified)

seed_data_creation: None. Booked ONE real Practice Better session as requested: session_id=69f3c64f5d2bdbfb66ef0ffb, client_record_id=69f3c64c5d2bdbfb66ef0fe2, start=2026-05-05T15:30:00Z.
context_for_next_testing_agent: raymond@fireside360.co.uk is now on current_step=2 with booking_info and pb_client_record_id populated. Do NOT re-book for this user without resetting. 30s booking cooldown per email applies.

backend_log_lines_observed: [d4w8mp0r] Auto-advancing user from Step 1 to Step 2
[d4w8mp0r] Step 1 LeadConnector webhook sent for raymond@fireside360.co.uk
[d4w8mp0r] Saved booking_info and pb_client_record_id to user record
verification_evidence.regression_no_jwt_no_5xx: POST /api/booking/book with NO Authorization header for an unknown email returned HTTP 409 (slot unavailable, expected since the slot we just booked is now taken). No 500. Fallback path reached the email-match branch correctly.
